experiment_8.Task: Perform genome annotation in Galaxy, evaluate annotation quality, and visualize the results.
experiment_8.Prompt: I need to perform genome annotation in Galaxy using the provided genome, transcript or protein, and auxiliary training files, then evaluate the quality of the annotation and visualize the results. Please choose an appropriate Galaxy pipeline, run it, and report the evaluation tool, the visualization tool, and the total number of tool executions in the pipeline you actually ran.
